contentBlocks.original:
पृथ्वी सगंधा सरसाः तथाऽपः स्पर्शी च वायु ज्वलितं च तेजः।
नभः सशब्दं महता सहैव कुर्वतु सर्वे मम सुप्रभातम् ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pṛthvī sagaṃdhā sarasāḥ tathā'paḥ sparśī ca vāyu jvalitaṃ ca tejaḥ.
nabhaḥ saśabdaṃ mahatā sahaiva kurvatu sarve mama suprabhātam ..
contentBlocks.translation: The fragrant earth, the waters of reservoirs, the touch of the wind, the brilliance of the fire and the great voice of the akasa - may all of them make mine a good morning.
contentBlocks.meanings: पृथ्वी (pṛthvī) – earth; सगंधा (sagaṃdhā) – fragrant; सरसाः (sarasāḥ) – full of water; तथा (tathā) – and; अपः (apaḥ) – waters; स्पर्शी (sparśī) – touching; च (ca) – and; वायु (vāyu) – wind; ज्वलितं (jvalitaṃ) – brilliance; च (ca) – and; तेजः (tejaḥ) – fire; नभः (nabhaḥ) – sky; सशब्दं (saśabdaṃ) – with sound; महता (mahatā) – great; सहैव (sahaiva) – together with; कुर्वतु (kurvatu) – may make; सर्वे (sarve) – all; मम (mama) – my; सुप्रभातम् (suprabhātam) – good morning;
